mapper.select: SELECT order_id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, actual_amount, payment_method, payment_status, order_status, create_time, pay_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
order_status = #{orderStatus},
remark = #{remark},
WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT item_id, order_id, product_id, product_type, product_name, price, quantity, total_price, use_date, item_status FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
